channel.title: 193rd Annual General Conference

itunes:owner.itunes:name: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

item.title: The Greatest Easter Story Ever Told
item.description:
The Greatest Easter Story Ever Told by Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
Look at the Book of Mormon in a new light and consider the profound witness it bears of the reality of the risen Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Never Give Up an Opportunity to Testify of Christ
item.description:
Never Give Up an Opportunity to Testify of Christ by President Bonnie H. Cordon, Young Women General President given in the Saturday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
True joy rests on our willingness to come closer to Christ and witness for ourselves.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Bonnie H. Cordon, Young Women General President

item.title: Just Keep Going—with Faith
item.description:
Just Keep Going—with Faith by Elder Carl B. Cook, Of the Presidency of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
Exercising faith in our Savior, Jesus Christ, helps us overcome discouragement no matter what obstacles we encounter.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Carl B. Cook, Of the Presidency of the Seventy

item.title: Ministering
item.description:
Ministering by Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
Let us reach out and care as our Savior would, especially to those whom we are privileged by love and assignment to minister.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Safely Gathered Home
item.description:
Safely Gathered Home by Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
We are in a unique position to gather Israel on both sides of the veil as never before under the Father’s plan.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: A Living Prophet for the Latter Days
item.description:
A Living Prophet for the Latter Days by Elder Allen D. Haynie, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
Father in Heaven has chosen the pattern of revealing truth to His children through a prophet.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Allen D. Haynie, Of the Seventy

item.title: Finding Personal Peace
item.description:
Finding Personal Peace by President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
I pray that you may find peace, help many others to find it, and pass it along.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers
item.description:
Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers by Presented by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
undefined
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. item.itunes:author: Presented by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Church Auditing Department Report, 2022
item.description:
Church Auditing Department Report, 2022 by Presented by Jared B. Larson, Managing Director, Church Auditing Department given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
To the First Presidency of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Presented by Jared B. Larson, Managing Director, Church Auditing Department

item.title: Accessing God’s Power through Covenants
item.description:
Accessing God’s Power through Covenants by Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
As you walk the covenant path, from baptism to the temple and throughout life, I promise you power to go against the natural worldly flow.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: He Could Heal !
item.description:
He Could Heal ! by Elder Peter F. Meurs, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
The Savior’s healing and redeeming power applies to accidental mistakes, poor decisions, challenges, and trials of every kind—as well as to our sins.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Peter F. Meurs, Of the Seventy

item.title: Your Patriarchal Blessing—Inspired Direction from Heavenly Father
item.description:
Your Patriarchal Blessing—Inspired Direction from Heavenly Father by Elder Randall K. Bennett, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
My patriarchal blessing helped me understand my true eternal identity—who I really was and who I could become.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Randall K. Bennett, Of the Seventy

item.title: “There Can Be Nothing So Exquisite and Sweet as Was My Joy”
item.description:
“There Can Be Nothing So Exquisite and Sweet as Was My Joy” by Elder Craig C. Christensen, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
Repenting daily and coming unto Jesus Christ is the way to experience joy—joy beyond our imagination.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Craig C. Christensen, Of the Seventy

item.title: Trusting the Doctrine of Christ
item.description:
Trusting the Doctrine of Christ by Elder Evan A. Schmutz, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
When we have built our houses on the foundation of a covenantal relationship with Christ, we are trusting the doctrine of Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Evan A. Schmutz, Of the Seventy

item.title: The Work of the Temple and Family History—One and the Same Work
item.description:
The Work of the Temple and Family History—One and the Same Work by Elder Benjamín De Hoyos, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
A central focus of the plan of our Heavenly Father is uniting family for this life and for eternity.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Benjamín De Hoyos, Of the Seventy

item.title: Jesus Christ Is the Strength of Parents
item.description:
Jesus Christ Is the Strength of Parents by Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
Help your children build faith in Jesus Christ, love His gospel and His Church, and prepare for a lifetime of righteous choices.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Christlike Poise
item.description:
Christlike Poise by Elder Mark A. Bragg, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
“And he arose, and rebuked the wind, and said unto the sea, Peace, be still. And the wind ceased, and there was a great calm” ().
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Mark A. Bragg, Of the Seventy

item.title: Focus on Jesus Christ
item.description:
Focus on Jesus Christ by Brother Milton Camargo, First Counselor in the Sunday School General Presidency given in the Saturday Evening session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
The Lord Jesus Christ is the solution to our problems, but we must lift our eyes and raise our sights to see Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Brother Milton Camargo, First Counselor in the Sunday School General Presidency

item.title: Have I Truly Been Forgiven?
item.description:
Have I Truly Been Forgiven? by Elder K. Brett Nattress, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
The promise of complete and perfect forgiveness is made to everyone—in and through the infinite Atonement of Jesus Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder K. Brett Nattress, Of the Seventy

item.title: The Lord Jesus Christ Teaches Us to Minister
item.description:
The Lord Jesus Christ Teaches Us to Minister by Elder Juan A. Uceda, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Evening session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
With our Savior’s help, we can love His precious sheep and minister to them as He would.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Juan A. Uceda, Of the Seventy

item.title: One in Christ
item.description:
One in Christ by Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
It is only in and through our individual loyalty to and love of Jesus Christ that we can hope to be one.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Jesus Christ Is Relief
item.description:
Jesus Christ Is Relief by President Camille N. Johnson, Relief Society General President given in the Sunday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
We can partner with the Savior to help provide temporal and spiritual relief for those in need—and in the process find our own relief.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Camille N. Johnson, Relief Society General President

item.title: Followers of the Prince of Peace
item.description:
Followers of the Prince of Peace by Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
As we strive to develop attributes like the Savior’s, we can become instruments of His peace in the world.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: When to Receive Your Patriarchal Blessing
item.description:
When to Receive Your Patriarchal Blessing by Elder Kazuhiko Yamashita, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
When you receive your blessing, you will realize and feel how Heavenly Father and Jesus Christ love you and how They focus on you individually.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Kazuhiko Yamashita, Of the Seventy

item.title: My Mind Caught Hold upon This Thought of Jesus Christ
item.description:
My Mind Caught Hold upon This Thought of Jesus Christ by Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
As you continue to attentively catch hold of the thought of Jesus Christ, I promise you not only heavenly guidance but heavenly power.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: A Voice of Gladness!
item.description:
A Voice of Gladness! by Elder Kevin R. Duncan, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
The building of temples has been one of the highest priorities of all prophets since the Prophet Joseph Smith.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Kevin R. Duncan, Of the Seventy

item.title: Peacemakers Needed
item.description:
Peacemakers Needed by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the Sunday Morning session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
You have your agency to choose contention or reconciliation. I urge you to choose to be a peacemaker, now and always.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.title: The Teachings of Jesus Christ
item.description:
The Teachings of Jesus Christ by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
We are given the scriptures to direct our lives. My message today consists of a selection of the words of our Savior—what He said.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Remember What Matters Most
item.description:
Remember What Matters Most by President M. Russell Ballard, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
What matters most is our relationships with Heavenly Father and His Beloved Son, our families, and our neighbors, and allowing the Spirit to guide us.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President M. Russell Ballard, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Hosanna to the Most High God
item.description:
Hosanna to the Most High God by Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
Jesus Christ’s triumphant entry into Jerusalem and the events of the week that followed exemplify doctrine we can apply in our lives today.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: The Imperfect Harvest
item.description:
The Imperfect Harvest by Elder Vern P. Stanfill, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
The Savior stands ready to accept our humble offerings and perfect them through His grace. With Christ, there is no imperfect harvest.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Vern P. Stanfill, Of the Seventy

item.title: After the Fourth Day
item.description:
After the Fourth Day by Elder W. Mark Bassett, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
As we move forward with faith in Jesus Christ, the fourth day will always come. He will always come to our aid.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder W. Mark Bassett, Of the Seventy

item.title: Do You Know Why I as a Christian Believe in Christ?
item.description:
Do You Know Why I as a Christian Believe in Christ? by Elder Ahmad S. Corbitt, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
Jesus Christ had to suffer, die, and rise again to redeem all humanity from physical death and to give eternal life with God.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ahmad S. Corbitt, Of the Seventy

item.title: “Abide in Me, and I in You; Therefore Walk with Me”
item.description:
“Abide in Me, and I in You; Therefore Walk with Me” by Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
The Savior’s promise to abide in us is true and available to every covenant-keeping member of His restored Church.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: The Answer Is Always Jesus Christ
item.description:
The Answer Is Always Jesus Christ by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 193rd Annual General Conference on Fri Mar 31 2023
Whatever questions or problems you have, the answer is always found in the life and teachings of Jesus Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
